title: Agent Guidelines for OmopHelpers
text: document provides instructions agentic coding agents operating repository.

title: Agent Guidelines for OmopHelpers
text: Check Package: R CMD check . Build Package: R CMD build . Generate Documentation: roxygen2::roxygenise() Run Tests: dedicated test suite found. single file, use devtools::test_file("tests/testthat/test-file.R").

title: Agent Guidelines for OmopHelpers
text: Style: Follow tidyverse style guide. Use styler lintr formatting linting. Imports: Use library() require() top scripts. Formatting: Use styler::style_pkg() format entire package. Types: Use explicit type checks necessary. Naming: Use snake_case variables functions. Error Handling: Use tryCatch() error handling. Comments: Use roxygen2 comments functions.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Gabriel Maeztu. Maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Maeztu G (2026). OmopHelpers: IOMED's OHDSI OMOP Utilities. R package version 0.1.4, https://github.com/iomedhealth/OmopHelpers.
code: @Manual{,   title = {OmopHelpers: IOMED's OHDSI OMOP Utilities},   author = {Gabriel Maeztu},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.4},   url = {https://github.com/iomedhealth/OmopHelpers}, }

title: IOMED's OHDSI OMOP Utilities
text: OmopHelpers R package provides collection utility functions working OHDSI data, particularly within IOMED environment. simplifies common tasks creating codelists, merging , visualizing data distributions.

title: IOMED's OHDSI OMOP Utilities
text: can install OmopHelpers GitHub using devtools package:

what: Creating a Codelist from a Concept Set
title: IOMED's OHDSI OMOP Utilities
text: getCodelistFromConceptSet function allows create codelist object directly concept_set_id.
code: library(OmopHelpers) library(DBI)  # Assume 'con' is a valid DBI connection to your OMOP CDM # and 'cdmSchema' is the schema where your OMOP tables reside.  # Example: Create a codelist for concept set ID 123 my_codelist <- getCodelistFromConceptSet(   conceptSetId = 123,   con = con,   cdmSchema = "your_cdm_schema" )

title: IOMED's OHDSI OMOP Utilities
text: can merge multiple codelist objects single one using mergeCodelists.
code: # Assuming 'codelist1' and 'codelist2' are two existing codelist objects merged_codes <- mergeCodelists(codelist1, codelist2, newName = "merged_codelist_name")

title: IOMED's OHDSI OMOP Utilities
text: plotMeasurementDistribution function generates histogram density plot given measurement.
code: # Assume 'my_cohort_data' is a data frame or tibble # containing patient data and measurements.  # Example: Create a histogram for a measurement starting with "hba1c" plotMeasurementDistribution(   data = my_cohort_data,   variable = "hba1c",   variableDisplay = "HbA1c",   plotTitle = "Distribution of HbA1c at Baseline" )  # Example: Create a density plot stratified by a 'treatment' column plotMeasurementDistribution(   data = my_cohort_data,   variable = "cholesterol",   variableDisplay = "Cholesterol Level",   plotTitle = "Cholesterol Distribution by Treatment Group",   plotType = "density",   strata = "treatment" )

title: IOMED's OHDSI OMOP Utilities
text: package licensed MIT License.

title: buildCodelistTree — buildCodelistTree
text: Traverses nested list concept sets (codelists). every node, recursively gathers concept IDs sub-nodes leaves, injects new `omopgenerics::codelist` object named `$merged` level.

title: buildCodelistTree — buildCodelistTree
text: node list lists codelists, representing semantic tree concepts. node_name Character. Name assign merged codelist current node.

title: buildCodelistTree — buildCodelistTree
text: nested list identical structure input, `$merged` elements added.

title: buildCodelistTree — buildCodelistTree
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(omopgenerics) mock_list <- list(   GroupA = list(Sub1 = newCodelist(list(a = 1:2))),   GroupB = newCodelist(list(b = as.integer(3))) ) res <- buildCodelistTree(mock_list) print(res$merged) print(res$GroupA$merged) } # }

title: clean_name — clean_name
text: helper function remove trailing numeric codes string. looks dash followed space one digits end string.

title: clean_name — clean_name
text: name_string character string remove code.

title: clean_name — clean_name
text: cleaned character string without trailing code.

title: computeHospitalizationCohorts — computeHospitalizationCohorts
text: Generates cohort table containing hospitalizations readmissions `visit_occurrence` table. Overlapping contiguous inpatient visits merged single episode. readmission defined episode starts within `readmission_window` days end previous episode.

title: computeHospitalizationCohorts — computeHospitalizationCohorts
code: computeHospitalizationCohorts(   cdm,   name,   visitConceptIds = c(9201, 262),   readmission_window = 30 )

title: computeHospitalizationCohorts — computeHospitalizationCohorts
text: cdm CDM reference object. name name cohort table created database. visitConceptIds vector integer concept IDs representing inpatient visits. Default: `c(9201, 262)` (Inpatient Visit, Emergency Room Inpatient Visit). readmission_window Integer indicating maximum number days discharge subsequent admission considered readmission. Default: 30.

title: computeHospitalizationCohorts — computeHospitalizationCohorts
text: cohort table two `cohort_definition_id`s: - 1: Hospitalization - 2: Readmission

title: getAllConceptSets — getAllConceptSets
text: Retrieves concept sets database returns named list codelists.

title: getAllConceptSets — getAllConceptSets
text: con DBI connection database. cdmSchema name schema OMOP tables reside.

title: getAllConceptSets — getAllConceptSets
text: named list `codelist` objects.

title: getCodelistFromConceptSet — getCodelistFromConceptSet
text: function queries `concept_set` `concept_set_item` tables build formal `codelist` object `omopgenerics` package.

title: getCodelistFromConceptSet — getCodelistFromConceptSet
text: conceptSetId concept_set_id query . con DBI connection database. cdmSchema name schema OMOP tables reside.

title: getCodelistFromConceptSet — getCodelistFromConceptSet
text: named `codelist` object.

title: getCodelistFromConceptSet — getCodelistFromConceptSet
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(DBI) library(duckdb) con <- dbConnect(duckdb::duckdb()) # ... setup concept tables ... codes <- getCodelistFromConceptSet(123, con, "main") } # }

title: mergeCodelists — mergeCodelists
text: Merges multiple `codelist` objects `omopgenerics` package single new `codelist`. combines concept IDs input lists removes duplicates.

title: mergeCodelists — mergeCodelists
text: ... arbitrary number `codelist` objects merged. newName character string specifying name new merged codelist.

title: mergeCodelists — mergeCodelists
text: single, merged `codelist` object named according `newName` parameter.

title: mergeCodelists — mergeCodelists
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Assuming bb_codes and ccb_codes are valid codelist objects first_line_therapies <- mergeCodelists(bb_codes, ccb_codes, newName = "first_line_hcm_drugs") } # }

title: plotMeasurementDistribution (Fully Configurable) — plotMeasurementDistribution
text: Plots histogram density plot measurement variable, full support stratification plot types. selects earliest measurement patient baseline.

title: plotMeasurementDistribution (Fully Configurable) — plotMeasurementDistribution
code: plotMeasurementDistribution(   data,   variable,   variableDisplay,   plotTitle,   plotType = "histogram",   strata = NULL,   bins = 30 )

title: plotMeasurementDistribution (Fully Configurable) — plotMeasurementDistribution
text: data input cohort table (tibble data frame). variable string measurement column name starts . variableDisplay user-friendly name x-axis label. plotTitle title plot. plotType type plot generate: "histogram" "density". Defaults "histogram". strata optional character string name column stratify . bins integer number histogram bins. Defaults 30.

title: plotMeasurementDistribution (Fully Configurable) — plotMeasurementDistribution
text: ggplot object.

title: process_codelists — process_codelists
text: Processes vector codelist objects. iterates vector, extracts internal, descriptive name list's first element, removes trailing numeric codes, assigns first integer vector new, cleaned name.

title: process_codelists — process_codelists
text: codelist_vector list vector containing codelist objects, typically created function like `getCodelistFromConceptSet()`.

title: process_codelists — process_codelists
text: new list cleaned, descriptive names containing first integer vector original codelist.

title: OmopHelpers 0.1.1
text: Refactored utils.R qualify namespaces (e.g., dplyr::, ggplot2::) fixed scoping issues summariseNumeric2. Minor code cleanup formatting.
